3006700.name: Zombie Survival
3006700.description:
(This game is in early stages of development, everything is subject to change)

Can you survive the zombie apocalypse. Nasty humans are trying to end your way of life for no other reason than they were here first. Eat them.

This is the first game where the theme is literally zombie survival. No Humans Allowed, except as the main course. It's an apocalyptic city builder/survival game where attempt to take over a town/city, doing your part for the zombie apocalypse.

You start out with a small set of zombies, but through perseverance, and consuming brains, you gain knowledge and technology to grow the zombie horde.
3006700.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
